page.title: Access Control
page.description: Govern workspace access, agent operators, and exception paths from one console.
hero.title: Operators, agents, and permissions in one control plane.
hero.description: Keep workspace scope, runtime permissions, and exception handling readable at a glance.
workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.directoryHint: Review visible workspaces, switch context, and edit the selected tenant from one surface.
workspace.createHint: Create a new tenant scope and switch into it immediately when it becomes active.
workspace.deleteHint: Deleting a workspace removes this scope. If it is your last one, you will be signed out.
workspace.name: Name
workspace.activeHint: Inactive workspaces remain visible but should not accept new activity.
members.title: Members
members.description: Who can enter this workspace and what access state they are in.
members.empty: No members were returned for this workspace.
members.selectHint: Select a member to edit access state or inspect details.
roles.title: Role Sets
roles.description: Reusable access bundles for workspace operations.
roles.name: Role name
roles.selectHint: Pick a role set to edit its name or permission bundle.
permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.description: Low-level permission keys that define what people, agents, and overrides can do.
permissions.directoryDescription: Keep the registry visible on the left and edit the selected permission on the right.
permissions.directoryHint: Browse the permission registry without pushing the directory below the editor.
permissions.editorCreateDescription: Add a new permission before attaching it to role bundles or exception rules.
permissions.createHint: Add a new permission before attaching it to role bundles or exception rules.
permissions.selectHint: Pick a permission to edit or remove.
agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Provision agent identities, assign ownership, and control execution state.
agents.directoryHint: Keep execution identities explicit, owned, and easy to review.
agents.createHint: Create a dedicated execution principal instead of overloading a human account.
agents.empty: No agents are registered in the current tenant.
agents.selectHint: Select an agent to update its profile, ownership, or active state.
acl.title: Overrides
acl.directoryDescription: Keep targeted exceptions in a separate directory so long lists do not fight the permission editor.
acl.directoryHint: Review exception paths by permission, resource, and target from one directory.
acl.editorCreateDescription: Use overrides only when a role set cannot describe the required exception.
acl.createHint: Use overrides only when a role set cannot describe the required exception.
acl.subject: Target subject
acl.selectHint: Pick an override to update its target or effect.
acl.subjectHint: Attach either a principal or a role when you need a targeted exception path.
inspector.title: Inspector
inspector.description: Inspect one principal across workspace scope.
inspector.empty: Enter a principal ID to inspect access.
inspector.noMemberships: No memberships returned for this principal.
inspector.noRoles: No role sets in this scope.
inspector.noPermissions: No permissions returned for this principal.
